root.name: All API Services
root.description: Root node containing all API services across all functional domains

cat_sub11.name: Content & Media
cat_sub11.description: Services for creating, publishing, managing, and analyzing web content and digital media.
cat_sub11.boundary: Content creation tools, CMS, web publishing, media editing, content delivery, and content analytics.
cat_sub11.decision_rule: If the user wants to create, edit, publish, manage, or analyze web content or digital media, classify here.

cat_sub12.name: Social & Community
cat_sub12.description: Services for social networking, community building, and public communication platforms.
cat_sub12.boundary: Social networks, forums, community platforms, public messaging, and social media APIs.
cat_sub12.decision_rule: If the user wants to engage with a public or interest-based social network or community, classify here.

cat_sub13.name: Entertainment & Gaming
cat_sub13.description: Services for games, interactive entertainment, esports, and content streaming.
cat_sub13.boundary: Gaming platforms, streaming services, interactive entertainment, esports, and media consumption APIs.
cat_sub13.decision_rule: If the user wants to play games, watch streams, or access interactive entertainment content, classify here.

cat_sub14.name: Science & Research
cat_sub14.description: Services for scientific, academic, and industrial research, data, and analysis.
cat_sub14.boundary: Scientific data APIs, research tools, academic resources, industrial R&D platforms, and specialized datasets.
cat_sub14.decision_rule: If the user is conducting scientific, academic, or industrial research using specialized data/tools, classify here.

cat_sub15.name: Healthcare & Life Sciences
cat_sub15.description: Services for medical care, patient data, diagnostics, clinical research, and life sciences.
cat_sub15.boundary: Medical records, telehealth, diagnostics, clinical research, healthcare administration, and biomedical data.
cat_sub15.decision_rule: If the user is a patient, provider, or institution managing healthcare delivery or medical/life sciences data, classify here.

cat_sub16.name: Education & Learning
cat_sub16.description: Services for teaching, learning, training, and academic administration.
cat_sub16.boundary: Learning platforms, course management, educational content, academic administration, and tutoring tools.
cat_sub16.decision_rule: If the user wants to teach, learn, or administer educational courses and institutions, classify here.

cat_sub17.name: Travel & Local
cat_sub17.description: Services for travel booking, local business discovery, mapping, and real estate.
cat_sub17.boundary: Travel booking, local search, maps/navigation, real estate listings, and local service APIs.
cat_sub17.decision_rule: If the user wants to book travel, find local businesses, navigate, or browse real estate, classify here.

cat_sub18.name: Lifestyle & Personal
cat_sub18.description: Services for personal life, fitness, home, news, weather, sports, and general utilities.
cat_sub18.boundary: Personal life management, fitness tracking, smart home, news/weather, hobby information, and general utilities (e.g., time conversion).
cat_sub18.decision_rule: If the user wants information or tools for personal daily life, fitness, home, hobbies, or general utilities, classify here.

cat_sub19.name: Government & Public Data
cat_sub19.description: Services providing access to government datasets, public records, and civic information.
cat_sub19.boundary: Government APIs, public datasets, civic information, official records, and legislative data.
cat_sub19.decision_rule: If the user wants to access official government data, public records, or civic datasets, classify here.

cat_sub20.name: API Management & Integration
cat_sub20.description: Services for connecting, managing, and orchestrating APIs across multiple platforms.
cat_sub20.boundary: API gateways, integration platforms, workflow automation, API monitoring, and multi-service connectors.
cat_sub20.decision_rule: If the user wants to connect, manage, monitor, or orchestrate multiple APIs from different providers, classify here.

cat_sub21.name: Software Development
cat_sub21.description: Services for writing, testing, debugging, and managing code and applications.
cat_sub21.boundary: IDEs, code repositories, testing frameworks, package managers, debugging tools, and SDKs.
cat_sub21.decision_rule: If the user wants to write, test, debug, or manage code for software applications, classify here.

cat_sub22.name: IT Infrastructure & Operations
cat_sub22.description: Services for deploying, monitoring, maintaining, and managing IT systems and infrastructure.
cat_sub22.boundary: System administration, deployment tools, monitoring, logging, infrastructure management, and DevOps tools.
cat_sub22.decision_rule: If the user wants to deploy, monitor, maintain, or manage IT systems and infrastructure, classify here.

cat_sub23.name: Data & Analytics
cat_sub23.description: Services for storing, processing, analyzing, visualizing, and managing structured data.
cat_sub23.boundary: Databases, data warehouses, BI tools, data processing, business analytics, and search/data APIs.
cat_sub23.decision_rule: If the user wants to store, process, analyze, visualize, or govern structured data for insights, classify here.

cat_sub24.name: Artificial Intelligence
cat_sub24.description: Services for building, training, deploying, and using AI/ML models and intelligent applications.
cat_sub24.boundary: Machine learning platforms, AI model APIs, natural language processing, computer vision, and generative AI.
cat_sub24.decision_rule: If the user wants to develop, train, deploy, or use AI/ML models for intelligent applications, classify here.

cat_sub25.name: Security & Compliance
cat_sub25.description: Services for protecting systems and data, managing access, ensuring privacy, and meeting regulations.
cat_sub25.boundary: Authentication, authorization, encryption, threat detection, compliance management, and security monitoring.
cat_sub25.decision_rule: If the user wants to authenticate users, authorize access, protect data, ensure privacy, or meet regulations, classify here.

cat_sub26.name: Cloud & Hosting
cat_sub26.description: Services for on-demand computing, storage, and networking resources delivered over the internet.
cat_sub26.boundary: IaaS, hosting platforms, cloud compute/storage, CDN services, and serverless computing.
cat_sub26.decision_rule: If the user wants to provision scalable computing power, storage, or networking resources from a provider, classify here.

cat_sub27.name: API Aggregation & Marketplaces
cat_sub27.description: Services for discovering, accessing, and commercializing APIs from multiple providers.
cat_sub27.boundary: API marketplaces, API directories, API aggregation platforms, and developer portals for multiple APIs.
cat_sub27.decision_rule: If the user wants to discover, browse, compare, or access aggregated APIs from various providers, classify here.

cat_sub28.name: Search & Discovery
cat_sub28.description: Services for web search, information retrieval, data lookup, and discovery.
cat_sub28.boundary: Web search APIs, search engines, data lookup services, and discovery platforms.
cat_sub28.decision_rule: If the user wants to search the web, retrieve information, or look up data from external sources, classify here.

cat_sub4.name: Finance & Commerce
cat_sub4.description: Services for banking, payments, trading, e-commerce, and financial operations.
cat_sub4.boundary: Payment processing, banking APIs, trading platforms, e-commerce, accounting, and financial data.
cat_sub4.decision_rule: If the user wants to conduct financial transactions, manage money, trade assets, or run an online store, classify here.

cat_sub6.name: Business Operations
cat_sub6.description: Services for core business functions: marketing, CRM, project management, HR, and automation.
cat_sub6.boundary: Marketing automation, CRM, project management, HR systems, ERP, and business process automation.
cat_sub6.decision_rule: If the user wants to market, manage customer relationships, run projects, automate processes, or manage employees, classify here.

cat_sub7.name: Productivity & Collaboration
cat_sub7.description: Services for team communication, document handling, task management, and work coordination.
cat_sub7.boundary: Communication tools, document collaboration, task management, calendar/email, and team coordination platforms.
cat_sub7.decision_rule: If the user wants to communicate, collaborate, manage tasks, or handle documents for work purposes, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub1.name: Content Creation & Authoring
cat_sub11_sub1.description: Services for writing, drafting, and composing textual content, documents, and presentations.
cat_sub11_sub1.boundary: Not for visual/audio media creation (see Media Generation), content management systems (see Content Management), or content analysis (see Content Analysis).
cat_sub11_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables writing, drafting, or assembling text-based documents or presentations, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub10.name: Content Enhancement & Rewriting
cat_sub11_sub10.description: Services for improving, paraphrasing, summarizing, or stylistically transforming existing text content.
cat_sub11_sub10.boundary: Not for translation (see Content Translation), content creation from scratch (see Content Creation), or content analysis (see Content Analysis).
cat_sub11_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily rewrites, summarizes, or stylistically enhances existing text content, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub11.name: Audio Synthesis & Voice
cat_sub11_sub11.description: Services for generating synthetic speech, voice cloning, and text-to-speech conversion.
cat_sub11_sub11.boundary: Not for audio editing/production (see Media Editing), music generation (see Media Generation), or audio analysis (see Media Analysis).
cat_sub11_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily converts text to speech, clones voices, or generates synthetic audio narration, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub12.name: Content Analysis & SEO
cat_sub11_sub12.description: Services for analyzing content performance, search engine optimization, and audience insights.
cat_sub11_sub12.boundary: Not for content creation (see Content Creation), web analytics (see Audience Analytics), or media analysis (see Media Analysis).
cat_sub11_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes content for SEO, keyword research, or content performance metrics, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub13.name: Audience Analytics & Metrics
cat_sub11_sub13.description: Services for tracking and analyzing audience engagement, website traffic, and user behavior metrics.
cat_sub11_sub13.boundary: Not for content SEO analysis (see Content Analysis), media analytics (see Media Analysis), or email marketing (see Content Distribution).
cat_sub11_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides analytics on website traffic, user engagement, or audience behavior, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub14.name: Media Analysis & Validation
cat_sub11_sub14.description: Services for analyzing, validating, and extracting technical metadata from audio, video, and image files.
cat_sub11_sub14.boundary: Not for content analysis (see Content Analysis), audience analytics (see Audience Analytics), or media editing (see Media Editing).
cat_sub11_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes technical properties, validates formats, or extracts metadata from media files, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub15.name: Content Distribution & Email
cat_sub11_sub15.description: Services for distributing content via email campaigns, newsletters, and mailing lists.
cat_sub11_sub15.boundary: Not for audience analytics (see Audience Analytics), content management (see Content Management Systems), or social media posting (see Social Media).
cat_sub11_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages email campaigns, newsletters, or mailing lists for content distribution, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub16.name: Social Media Management
cat_sub11_sub16.description: Services for creating, scheduling, publishing, and managing content on social media platforms.
cat_sub11_sub16.boundary: Not for content creation tools (see Content Creation), audience analytics (see Audience Analytics), or content distribution via email (see Content Distribution).
cat_sub11_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables posting, scheduling, or managing content on social media platforms, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub17.name: Content Aggregation & Curation
cat_sub11_sub17.description: Services for collecting, aggregating, and curating content from various sources into organized collections.
cat_sub11_sub17.boundary: Not for content creation (see Content Creation), web search (see Web Content Fetching), or content management systems (see Content Management Systems).
cat_sub11_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily aggregates, collects, or curates content from multiple external sources into a unified collection, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub18.name: Web Content Fetching
cat_sub11_sub18.description: Services for extracting, scraping, or fetching content from websites and web pages.
cat_sub11_sub18.boundary: Not for content aggregation from APIs (see Content Aggregation), content analysis (see Content Analysis), or web publishing (see Web Publishing).
cat_sub11_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily extracts or fetches content directly from public websites, often bypassing bot protections, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub19.name: Digital Collections & Archives
cat_sub11_sub19.description: Services for accessing and searching curated digital collections, archives, and cultural databases.
cat_sub11_sub19.boundary: Not for personal media management (see Media Management), content aggregation from the web (see Content Aggregation), or general web search.
cat_sub11_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to curated digital archives, museum collections, or specialized cultural databases, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub2.name: Media Generation
cat_sub11_sub2.description: Services for generating images, videos, audio, 3D models, or other visual/audio media from prompts or inputs.
cat_sub11_sub2.boundary: Not for editing existing media (see Media Editing), managing generated media (see Media Management), or analyzing media (see Media Analysis).
cat_sub11_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates new visual, audio, or 3D media assets from scratch or prompts, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub20.name: Knowledge Base & Documentation
cat_sub11_sub20.description: Services for creating, managing, and interacting with structured knowledge bases, wikis, and documentation.
cat_sub11_sub20.boundary: Not for general content management systems (see Content Management Systems), personal note-taking, or web publishing (see Web Publishing).
cat_sub11_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages structured knowledge bases, wikis, or technical documentation systems, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub3.name: Media Editing & Production
cat_sub11_sub3.description: Services for modifying, enhancing, or producing professional audio, video, or image content.
cat_sub11_sub3.boundary: Not for generating media from scratch (see Media Generation), simple media management (see Media Management), or media analysis (see Media Analysis).
cat_sub11_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily edits, mixes, or produces professional-grade audio/video/image content, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub4.name: Content Management Systems
cat_sub11_sub4.description: Services for managing, organizing, and publishing content within dedicated CMS platforms.
cat_sub11_sub4.boundary: Not for general content creation tools (see Content Creation), website builders (see Web Publishing), or file storage (see Media Management).
cat_sub11_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides a platform to store, organize, version, and publish structured content, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub5.name: Web Publishing & Site Builders
cat_sub11_sub5.description: Services for building, deploying, and managing websites, web pages, and online publications.
cat_sub11_sub5.boundary: Not for content creation (see Content Creation), content management systems (see Content Management Systems), or media hosting (see Media Delivery).
cat_sub11_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables building, deploying, or managing the structure and hosting of websites, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub6.name: Media Management & Storage
cat_sub11_sub6.description: Services for storing, organizing, retrieving, and managing libraries of media files and assets.
cat_sub11_sub6.boundary: Not for generating media (see Media Generation), editing media (see Media Editing), or delivering media to end-users (see Media Delivery).
cat_sub11_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides storage, library organization, and asset management for media files, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub7.name: Media Delivery & Streaming
cat_sub11_sub7.description: Services for delivering, distributing, and streaming audio/video content to end-users.
cat_sub11_sub7.boundary: Not for media generation/editing (see Media Generation/Editing), media storage (see Media Management), or live stream management (see Live Streaming).
cat_sub11_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily delivers or streams pre-recorded audio/video content to audiences, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub8.name: Live Streaming & Broadcast
cat_sub11_sub8.description: Services for managing, producing, and distributing live video/audio streams and broadcasts.
cat_sub11_sub8.boundary: Not for on-demand media delivery (see Media Delivery), video editing (see Media Editing), or content analytics (see Content Analysis).
cat_sub11_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables managing, multi-platform distribution, or production of live audio/video streams, classify here.

cat_sub11_sub9.name: Content Translation & Localization
cat_sub11_sub9.description: Services for translating text or localizing content for different languages and regions.
cat_sub11_sub9.boundary: Not for text rewriting/paraphrasing (see Content Enhancement), voice synthesis (see Audio Synthesis), or general content creation (see Content Creation).
cat_sub11_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily translates text between languages or adapts content for regional audiences, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub1.name: General Social Networks
cat_sub12_sub1.description: APIs for mainstream social networking platforms like X/Twitter, Bluesky, and LinkedIn for posting and profile interactions.
cat_sub12_sub1.boundary: Public social networking platforms focused on general content sharing and connections.
cat_sub12_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with mainstream social media platforms for public posting and networking, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub10.name: Content Creation & Analytics Tools
cat_sub12_sub10.description: APIs for social media content creation (PostIdentity) and analytics services (Metricool).
cat_sub12_sub10.boundary: Tools that create content for social media or analyze social media performance.
cat_sub12_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates content for social media or provides analytics/metrics for social content, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub12.name: Community Discovery & Directory Services
cat_sub12_sub12.description: APIs for community discovery services like PulseMCP and MCP Hunt to explore social communities.
cat_sub12_sub12.boundary: Services that help users discover, rate, or explore social communities and platforms.
cat_sub12_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily helps discover, rate, or explore social communities and platforms, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub13.name: Real-time Communication Servers
cat_sub12_sub13.description: APIs for real-time communication platforms like Discord for server management and live chat.
cat_sub12_sub13.boundary: Platforms enabling real-time chat, voice, and community communication servers.
cat_sub12_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with real-time chat servers and community communication platforms, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub2.name: Messaging Applications
cat_sub12_sub2.description: APIs for instant messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, and LINE for direct messaging and group chats.
cat_sub12_sub2.boundary: Platforms centered on private or group text/voice communication.
cat_sub12_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables direct messaging or personal chat functionality through messaging apps, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub3.name: Video & Audio Platforms
cat_sub12_sub3.description: APIs for video/audio platforms like YouTube, Bilibili, and Audius for content management and discovery.
cat_sub12_sub3.boundary: Platforms focused primarily on video or audio content sharing and streaming.
cat_sub12_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with video or audio-focused social platforms, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub4.name: Community Forums & Discussions
cat_sub12_sub4.description: APIs for discussion platforms like Reddit, Discourse, and MediaWiki for thread participation and content management.
cat_sub12_sub4.boundary: Platforms organized around threaded discussions, forums, or wikis.
cat_sub12_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with forum-based discussion platforms for community conversations, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub5.name: Visual Content Platforms
cat_sub12_sub5.description: APIs for image and visual content platforms like Instagram and Gyazo for photo sharing and media interactions.
cat_sub12_sub5.boundary: Platforms centered on image, photo, or visual media sharing.
cat_sub12_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with image-focused social platforms for visual content management, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub6.name: Professional & Business Networks
cat_sub12_sub6.description: APIs for professional platforms like LinkedIn and business listing/review services like Uberall.
cat_sub12_sub6.boundary: Platforms focused on career networking, business listings, or customer reviews.
cat_sub12_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with platforms for professional networking or business presence management, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub7.name: Special Interest Communities
cat_sub12_sub7.description: APIs for gaming, hobby, fitness, or regional platforms like BoardGameGeek, Strava, and RedNote.
cat_sub12_sub7.boundary: Platforms centered on specific interests, activities, or regional/cultural markets.
cat_sub12_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with social platforms focused on specific hobbies, activities, or regions, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub8.name: Decentralized Social Networks
cat_sub12_sub8.description: APIs for decentralized protocols like ActivityPub (Fediverse) enabling federated social interactions.
cat_sub12_sub8.boundary: Decentralized or federated social networking protocols and platforms.
cat_sub12_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily interacts with decentralized or federated social networking protocols, classify here.

cat_sub12_sub9.name: Multi-Platform Aggregators
cat_sub12_sub9.description: APIs that aggregate data across multiple social platforms like Supadata for cross-platform analytics.
cat_sub12_sub9.boundary: Services that aggregate or manage data across multiple different social platforms.
cat_sub12_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily aggregates or manages data across multiple different social platforms, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub1.name: Biomedical & Life Sciences Research
cat_sub14_sub1.description: Services for biomedical literature, clinical data, genomic information, and life sciences research databases.
cat_sub14_sub1.boundary: Includes biomedical literature, clinical data, genomic data, and general biological research. Excludes neuroscience-specific data, chemical compound databases, and psychology research without biomedical focus.
cat_sub14_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides biomedical literature, clinical data, genomic information, or general biological research data, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub10.name: Social Sciences & Economics Research
cat_sub14_sub10.description: Services for economic indicators, social science data, policy analysis, and legal research.
cat_sub14_sub10.boundary: Includes economic indicators, development statistics, social science data, macroeconomic research, legal documents, legislation, and policy analysis. Excludes financial market data and business analytics.
cat_sub14_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides economic indicators, social science data, policy analysis, or legal research data, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub11.name: Knowledge Systems & Semantic Data
cat_sub14_sub11.description: Services for knowledge graphs, semantic data, AI knowledge management, and structured knowledge bases.
cat_sub14_sub11.boundary: Includes knowledge graphs, semantic relationships, entity linking, and AI knowledge management systems. Excludes traditional databases and unstructured data.
cat_sub14_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides knowledge graphs, semantic relationships, entity linking, or AI knowledge management systems, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub14.name: Astronomy & Space Science
cat_sub14_sub14.description: Services for astronomical data, space mission information, and astrophysics research.
cat_sub14_sub14.boundary: Includes astronomical data, space mission information, celestial object research, and astrophysics data. Excludes earth observation data and satellite imagery of Earth.
cat_sub14_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides astronomical data, space mission information, celestial object research, or astrophysics data, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub16.name: Research Automation & Workflow Tools
cat_sub14_sub16.description: Services for automating research tasks, batch processing, and scientific workflow management.
cat_sub14_sub16.boundary: Includes research automation platforms, batch task processing, and scientific workflow tools. Excludes domain-specific research databases and general computational tools.
cat_sub14_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides automation of research tasks, batch processing capabilities, or scientific workflow management, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub2.name: Chemistry & Materials Science
cat_sub14_sub2.description: Services for chemical compounds, molecular structures, material properties, and engineering data.
cat_sub14_sub2.boundary: Includes chemical compounds, molecular structures, biochemical pathways, material properties, crystal structures, and technical specifications. Excludes catalysis engineering data and industrial process information.
cat_sub14_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides chemical compound data, molecular structures, material properties, or engineering specifications, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub3.name: Academic Literature & Publications
cat_sub14_sub3.description: Services for searching, accessing, and managing scholarly publications across all disciplines.
cat_sub14_sub3.boundary: Includes academic papers, publications, and citation management across disciplines. Excludes discipline-specific research databases, raw datasets, and patent documentation.
cat_sub14_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to academic papers, publications, or citation management across disciplines, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub4.name: Geospatial & Earth Science
cat_sub14_sub4.description: Services for satellite imagery, geographic data, earth observation, and planetary science.
cat_sub14_sub4.boundary: Includes geographic, satellite, and planetary spatial data. Excludes astronomical data beyond Earth's orbit and non-spatial scientific data.
cat_sub14_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides geographic, satellite, or planetary spatial data, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub6.name: Computer Science & AI Research
cat_sub14_sub6.description: Services for computer science research, AI models, cybersecurity data, and distributed systems.
cat_sub14_sub6.boundary: Includes computer science research publications, AI research data, deep learning models, cybersecurity data, malware analysis, and blockchain research. Excludes general software tools and applied AI platforms.
cat_sub14_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides computer science research, AI models, cybersecurity data, or distributed systems research, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub7.name: Research Data Management & Discovery
cat_sub14_sub7.description: Services for research data metadata, dataset discovery, data citation, and collaboration platforms.
cat_sub14_sub7.boundary: Includes research data metadata, dataset discovery, data citation services, and research collaboration platforms. Excludes accessing actual research data content and raw datasets.
cat_sub14_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides research data metadata, dataset discovery, data citation services, or research collaboration platforms, classify here.

cat_sub14_sub8.name: Mathematics & Computational Research
cat_sub14_sub8.description: Services for mathematical research, computational tools, theorem proving, and scientific computing.
cat_sub14_sub8.boundary: Includes mathematical research tools, theorem proving, formal verification, computational mathematics, and scientific computing platforms. Excludes domain-specific research databases and data analysis competitions.
cat_sub14_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides mathematical research tools, computational platforms, theorem proving, or scientific computing environments, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub1.name: Health & Fitness Tracking
cat_sub18_sub1.description: Services for monitoring physical activity, workouts, body measurements, sleep analysis, and fitness goals.
cat_sub18_sub1.boundary: Focuses on personal health metrics and physical activity data.
cat_sub18_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily tracks physical activity, workouts, body metrics, or sleep patterns, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub10.name: Entertainment & Media
cat_sub18_sub10.description: Services for entertainment content, media collections, games, and leisure activities.
cat_sub18_sub10.boundary: Focuses on consumable media and recreational content.
cat_sub18_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides entertainment content, media collections, or game data, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub11.name: Travel, Navigation & Location
cat_sub18_sub11.description: Services for travel planning, itinerary management, transportation, and location-based information.
cat_sub18_sub11.boundary: Focuses on movement, destinations, and geographical place data.
cat_sub18_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles travel planning, itinerary management, transportation, or location-based information, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub12.name: Home & Living Utilities
cat_sub18_sub12.description: Services for home management, utility calculations, cost estimation, and residential planning.
cat_sub18_sub12.boundary: Focuses on practical tools for home and living expenses.
cat_sub18_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides home utility calculations, cost estimation, or residential planning tools, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub13.name: System & Device Control
cat_sub18_sub13.description: Services for controlling computer systems, mobile devices, processes, and hardware connections.
cat_sub18_sub13.boundary: Focuses on direct control of computing devices and their processes.
cat_sub18_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily controls computer systems, mobile devices, or hardware connections, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub14.name: Personal Finance & Markets
cat_sub18_sub14.description: Services for cryptocurrency, stock market data, portfolio tracking, and personal finance management.
cat_sub18_sub14.boundary: Focuses on financial asset data, market tracking, and personal investment tools.
cat_sub18_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides cryptocurrency data, stock market info, portfolio tracking, or personal finance tools, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub15.name: Sports & Recreation Activities
cat_sub18_sub15.description: Services for recreational sports, coaching, activity booking, and personal sports improvement.
cat_sub18_sub15.boundary: Focuses on participatory sports, coaching, and recreational activity logistics.
cat_sub18_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides coaching, activity booking, or tools for personal sports participation and improvement, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub16.name: General Utilities & Diagnostics
cat_sub18_sub16.description: Services for miscellaneous utilities, password generation, system diagnostics, and service status checks.
cat_sub18_sub16.boundary: Focuses on general-purpose tools and system/service operational checks.
cat_sub18_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides general utility functions, system diagnostics, or checks service availability/status, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub2.name: Smart Home Control
cat_sub18_sub2.description: Services for controlling and monitoring smart home devices, appliances, lighting, and home automation systems.
cat_sub18_sub2.boundary: Focuses on direct control and monitoring of connected home devices.
cat_sub18_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily controls or monitors home automation devices and appliances, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub3.name: Task & Personal Management
cat_sub18_sub3.description: Services for managing tasks, projects, goals, personal growth, and productivity workflows.
cat_sub18_sub3.boundary: Focuses on organizing work and personal objectives, including goal tracking.
cat_sub18_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages tasks, to-do lists, projects, or personal goal tracking, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub4.name: Time & Scheduling
cat_sub18_sub4.description: Services for time conversion, timezone management, calendar events, and scheduling coordination.
cat_sub18_sub4.boundary: Focuses on temporal data and event scheduling.
cat_sub18_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles time conversion, timezone data, or calendar event management, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub5.name: Weather & Environmental Monitoring
cat_sub18_sub5.description: Services for weather forecasts, air quality, environmental conditions, and natural event alerts.
cat_sub18_sub5.boundary: Focuses on atmospheric, environmental, and geological event data.
cat_sub18_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides weather forecasts, air quality data, environmental conditions, or natural disaster alerts, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub6.name: Sports Data & Scores
cat_sub18_sub6.description: Services for sports statistics, game scores, player data, team information, and league standings.
cat_sub18_sub6.boundary: Focuses on professional and organized sports data.
cat_sub18_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides sports statistics, scores, or player/team data, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub7.name: News & Information Services
cat_sub18_sub7.description: Services for news articles, current events, curated content, company ethics, and informational updates.
cat_sub18_sub7.boundary: Focuses on published informational content from various sources.
cat_sub18_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily delivers news articles, current events, curated informational content, or company ethics data, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub8.name: Personal Knowledge & Data Search
cat_sub18_sub8.description: Services for organizing personal notes, knowledge bases, and searching files or data repositories.
cat_sub18_sub8.boundary: Focuses on personal information organization and retrieval.
cat_sub18_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily organizes personal knowledge, notes, or searches files and data repositories, classify here.

cat_sub18_sub9.name: Communication & Messaging
cat_sub18_sub9.description: Services for personal messaging, notifications, email management, and communication platforms.
cat_sub18_sub9.boundary: Focuses on interpersonal communication and notification delivery.
cat_sub18_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles personal messaging, notifications, or email management, classify here.

cat_sub20_sub1.name: Financial Services
cat_sub20_sub1.description: Services for banking, payments, trading, and financial data management.
cat_sub20_sub1.boundary: Includes payment processing, financial market data, banking APIs, and asset management. Excludes general billing/invoicing without financial transaction processing.
cat_sub20_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function involves processing financial transactions, managing financial assets, or providing financial market data.

cat_sub20_sub10.name: API Integration & Automation
cat_sub20_sub10.description: Services for connecting, orchestrating, and automating workflows across multiple applications.
cat_sub20_sub10.boundary: Includes low-code/no-code automation, workflow builders, multi-service connectors, and API orchestration. Excludes single-purpose integrations.
cat_sub20_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary value is integrating disparate APIs or automating processes across different systems.

cat_sub20_sub11.name: Media & Entertainment
cat_sub20_sub11.description: Services for streaming, media content, and entertainment platforms.
cat_sub20_sub11.boundary: Includes video/audio streaming, media libraries, content delivery, and digital publishing for entertainment. Excludes general content management.
cat_sub20_sub11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service delivers consumable media (video, audio, games) or manages rights to such content.

cat_sub20_sub13.name: Security & Identity
cat_sub20_sub13.description: Services for authentication, authorization, security monitoring, and compliance.
cat_sub20_sub13.boundary: Includes user authentication, access control, security audits, vulnerability management, and compliance reporting. Excludes general infrastructure security.
cat_sub20_sub13.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's core function is to secure systems, manage user identities, or enforce security policies.

cat_sub20_sub14.name: Internet of Things
cat_sub20_sub14.description: Services for connecting, managing, and collecting data from physical devices.
cat_sub20_sub14.boundary: Includes device management, sensor data ingestion, remote control, and IoT platform services. Excludes general hardware APIs.
cat_sub20_sub14.decision_rule: Classify here if the service is designed to interact with or manage networks of physical hardware devices (sensors, appliances).

cat_sub20_sub15.name: Document & File Management
cat_sub20_sub15.description: Services for storing, organizing, and processing documents and files.
cat_sub20_sub15.boundary: Includes document storage, file sharing, document generation, e-signature, and digital asset management. Excludes media streaming.
cat_sub20_sub15.decision_rule: Classify here if the service manages files or documents as primary objects, with features for storage, retrieval, or processing.

cat_sub20_sub16.name: AI/ML Model Services
cat_sub20_sub16.description: Services for AI model training, inference, and machine learning operations.
cat_sub20_sub16.boundary: Includes model training platforms, prediction APIs, vector databases, and MLOps tooling. Excludes AI agent frameworks.
cat_sub20_sub16.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provides or manages AI/ML models for training, inference, or data processing.

cat_sub20_sub17.name: AI Agent & Automation
cat_sub20_sub17.description: Services for AI agent frameworks, web automation, and intelligent task execution.
cat_sub20_sub17.boundary: Includes AI agent platforms, web scraping, browser automation, and intelligent workflow automation. Excludes pure model services.
cat_sub20_sub17.decision_rule: Classify here if the service uses AI to automate tasks, scrape web data, or execute intelligent workflows through agents.

cat_sub20_sub18.name: Data Collection & Web Services
cat_sub20_sub18.description: Services for web scraping, data extraction, and public API access.
cat_sub20_sub18.boundary: Includes web scraping tools, data extraction APIs, public dataset access, and web automation services. Excludes general data storage.
cat_sub20_sub18.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to collect, extract, or access data from web sources or public APIs.

cat_sub20_sub2.name: Communication & Messaging
cat_sub20_sub2.description: Services for email, SMS, chat, social media, and team communication.
cat_sub20_sub2.boundary: Includes sending, receiving, or routing messages and notifications between users or systems. Excludes marketing campaign automation.
cat_sub20_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's core purpose is to facilitate human-to-human or application-to-human communication via messages.

cat_sub20_sub3.name: Customer Relationship Management
cat_sub20_sub3.description: Services for managing customer data, sales pipelines, and customer interactions.
cat_sub20_sub3.boundary: Includes centralized customer profiles, sales process tracking, and customer support ticketing. Excludes general communication or marketing tools.
cat_sub20_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service is designed to manage the end-to-end relationship with a customer or prospect.

cat_sub20_sub4.name: Business Operations
cat_sub20_sub4.description: Services for project management, scheduling, content management, and business workflows.
cat_sub20_sub4.boundary: Includes project/task tracking, calendar/scheduling, content publishing, and general business process management. Excludes specialized industry solutions.
cat_sub20_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service organizes business workflows, manages time/resources, or publishes content for general business operations.

cat_sub20_sub5.name: Data & Analytics
cat_sub20_sub5.description: Services for data storage, querying, analytics, and business intelligence.
cat_sub20_sub5.boundary: Includes databases, data warehouses, analytics dashboards, and BI tools. Excludes AI/ML model training platforms.
cat_sub20_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to store, transform, query, or visualize structured data for insights.

cat_sub20_sub6.name: Developer Tools
cat_sub20_sub6.description: Services for code management, testing, and development workflow automation.
cat_sub20_sub6.boundary: Includes version control, automated testing, code quality, build automation, and release management. Excludes infrastructure provisioning.
cat_sub20_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service automates or supports parts of the software development lifecycle.

cat_sub20_sub7.name: Infrastructure & DevOps
cat_sub20_sub7.description: Services for cloud infrastructure, deployment, monitoring, and DevOps workflows.
cat_sub20_sub7.boundary: Includes compute, storage, networking, CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration, and system monitoring. Excludes development tools.
cat_sub20_sub7.decision_rule: Classify here if the service provisions, manages, or monitors the runtime environment for applications.

cat_sub20_sub9.name: Marketing & Advertising
cat_sub20_sub9.description: Services for marketing campaigns, advertising, and customer engagement.
cat_sub20_sub9.boundary: Includes email marketing, ad campaigns, social media marketing, and marketing automation. Excludes general communication tools.
cat_sub20_sub9.decision_rule: Classify here if the service is designed to execute outbound campaigns to attract or engage customers.

cat_sub21_sub1.name: Code Repository Management
cat_sub21_sub1.description: Services for version control, branching, merging, and managing code repositories.
cat_sub21_sub1.boundary: Focuses on git operations and repository management.
cat_sub21_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily manages git operations, repositories, or version control workflows.

cat_sub21_sub10.name: Code Execution Sandbox

cat_sub21_sub10.boundary: Focuses on isolated execution environments for code snippets, functions, or serverless workloads.
cat_sub21_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides isolated execution environments for code.

cat_sub21_sub11.name: Development Environment
cat_sub21_sub11.description: Services for configuring IDEs, development tools, and local workspace setup.
cat_sub21_sub11.boundary: Focuses on IDE configuration, workspace setup, and local development tooling.
cat_sub21_sub11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily manages IDE configurations or development workspace setup.

cat_sub21_sub12.name: Documentation Management
cat_sub21_sub12.description: Services for creating, managing, and accessing technical documentation and knowledge bases.
cat_sub21_sub12.boundary: Focuses on technical documentation and knowledge bases.
cat_sub21_sub12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily handles technical documentation or knowledge base access.

cat_sub21_sub13.name: Project Management
cat_sub21_sub13.description: Services for tracking issues, tasks, sprints, and development workflows.
cat_sub21_sub13.boundary: Focuses on development task and project tracking.
cat_sub21_sub13.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily manages development tasks, issues, or project tracking.

cat_sub21_sub14.name: Monitoring and Observability
cat_sub21_sub14.description: Services for application monitoring, logging, metrics collection, and performance tracking.
cat_sub21_sub14.boundary: Focuses on application performance monitoring and metrics.
cat_sub21_sub14.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily monitors application performance or collects operational metrics.

cat_sub21_sub15.name: File Format Processing

cat_sub21_sub15.boundary: Focuses on file format conversion and document parsing.
cat_sub21_sub15.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily converts, parses, or processes documents, spreadsheets, or media files.

cat_sub21_sub16.name: Mobile Development

cat_sub21_sub16.boundary: Focuses on mobile platforms, simulators, and mobile apps.
cat_sub21_sub16.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily works with mobile platforms, simulators, or mobile apps.

cat_sub21_sub17.name: Game Development

cat_sub21_sub18.name: Multimedia Development

cat_sub21_sub21.name: AI Model Integration

cat_sub21_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily works with API specifications, testing, or documentation.

cat_sub22_sub10.name: Endpoint & Device Management

cat_sub22_sub11.name: Testing & Quality Assurance
cat_sub22_sub11.description: Services for automated testing, quality validation, and test environment management.

cat_sub22_sub11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to perform automated testing, QA validation, or test environment management.

cat_sub22_sub12.name: Browser & Web Automation

cat_sub22_sub12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to automate browser interactions or perform web scraping.

cat_sub22_sub13.name: Code Execution & Sandboxing

cat_sub22_sub13.boundary: Isolated code execution. Excludes container management and shell command execution.
cat_sub22_sub13.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to provide secure code execution environments or sandboxing.

cat_sub22_sub14.name: Shell & Command Execution
cat_sub22_sub14.description: Services for executing shell commands, terminal operations, and system commands.
cat_sub22_sub14.boundary: Command-line operations. Excludes code execution sandboxes and browser automation.
cat_sub22_sub14.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to execute shell commands or terminal operations.

cat_sub22_sub15.name: Feature & Configuration Management
cat_sub22_sub15.description: Services for managing feature flags, configuration toggles, and application settings.
cat_sub22_sub15.boundary: Feature release and application configuration management. Excludes infrastructure configuration and service discovery.
cat_sub22_sub15.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to manage feature flags, configuration toggles, or application settings.

cat_sub22_sub16.name: Incident & Operations Management
cat_sub22_sub16.description: Services for managing incidents, alerts, on-call schedules, and IT operations workflows.
cat_sub22_sub16.boundary: Incident response and IT operations workflows. Excludes system monitoring and security alerting.
cat_sub22_sub16.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to manage incidents, alerts, on-call schedules, or IT operations workflows.

cat_sub22_sub17.name: Service Discovery & Configuration
cat_sub22_sub17.description: Services for service discovery, configuration management, and dynamic service registration.
cat_sub22_sub17.boundary: Service configuration and discovery. Excludes infrastructure provisioning and API management.
cat_sub22_sub17.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to manage service discovery, configuration, or dynamic registration.

cat_sub22_sub18.name: Blockchain & Web3 Operations
cat_sub22_sub18.description: Services for interacting with blockchain networks, smart contracts, and decentralized applications.
cat_sub22_sub18.boundary: Blockchain operations. Excludes traditional database and API management.
cat_sub22_sub18.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to interact with blockchain networks, execute smart contracts, or manage crypto transactions.

cat_sub22_sub19.name: API & Integration Management

cat_sub22_sub19.boundary: API connectivity and integration. Excludes message queuing and service discovery.
cat_sub22_sub19.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to manage API interactions, authentication, or third-party service integrations.

cat_sub22_sub2.name: Infrastructure Provisioning

cat_sub22_sub2.boundary: Provisioning and lifecycle management of cloud resources. Excludes monitoring, security, and application deployment.
cat_sub22_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to provision, configure, or manage cloud infrastructure resources (servers, storage, networks).

cat_sub22_sub20.name: Documentation & Knowledge Operations

cat_sub22_sub20.boundary: Technical documentation and knowledge base operations. Excludes file storage and database querying.
cat_sub22_sub20.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to access, manage, or analyze technical documentation or knowledge bases.

cat_sub22_sub21.name: Architecture & Dependency Analysis

cat_sub22_sub21.boundary: Code and system architecture analysis. Excludes runtime monitoring and testing execution.
cat_sub22_sub21.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to analyze code architecture, system dependencies, or technical relationships.

cat_sub22_sub3.name: Monitoring & Observability
cat_sub22_sub3.description: Services for collecting, analyzing, and alerting on system metrics, logs, and traces.
cat_sub22_sub3.boundary: Monitoring system health and performance. Excludes incident response workflows and security scanning.
cat_sub22_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to collect, query, visualize, or analyze system performance data (metrics, logs, traces).

cat_sub22_sub4.name: Message Queue & Streaming

cat_sub22_sub4.boundary: Asynchronous messaging and event streaming. Excludes database operations and synchronous API calls.

cat_sub22_sub5.name: Compute & Runtime Management

cat_sub22_sub6.name: CI/CD & Build Systems

cat_sub22_sub6.boundary: Software delivery pipelines. Excludes infrastructure provisioning and testing execution.
cat_sub22_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to automate build, test, or deployment pipelines (CI/CD).

cat_sub22_sub7.boundary: Network infrastructure. Excludes application-level networking and security firewalls.

cat_sub22_sub9.name: File & Storage Systems

cat_sub23_sub16.name: Government & Public Data

cat_sub23_sub17.name: Sports & Entertainment Data

cat_sub23_sub17.boundary: Focuses on sports, gaming, and entertainment data. Excludes general business analytics, social media data, and financial markets.

cat_sub23_sub18.name: Graph Databases
