cat_sub23_sub20.description: Services for cataloging, discovering, and governing data assets, schemas, and data lineage.
cat_sub23_sub20.boundary: Focuses on data cataloging and governance. Excludes data querying, database management, and business intelligence.
cat_sub23_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages data catalogs, metadata, or data governance information, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub21.name: Code Execution & Sandboxes
cat_sub23_sub21.description: Services for executing code in isolated environments for data analysis, calculations, and model evaluation.
cat_sub23_sub21.boundary: Focuses on secure code execution for data tasks. Excludes database management, API integration, and business intelligence.
cat_sub23_sub21.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides secure code execution, sandbox environments, or computational engines for data tasks, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub22.name: Optimization & Constraint Solving
cat_sub23_sub22.description: Services for solving optimization problems, constraint satisfaction, forecasting, and predictive modeling.
cat_sub23_sub22.boundary: Focuses on mathematical optimization and predictive analytics. Excludes general business intelligence, data processing, and code execution.
cat_sub23_sub22.decision_rule: If the service primarily solves optimization problems, performs constraint satisfaction, or provides forecasting/predictive modeling, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub23.name: Personal & Account Data
cat_sub23_sub23.description: Services for accessing personal financial accounts, transaction data, user profiles, and personal information.
cat_sub23_sub23.boundary: Focuses on personal account data and user information. Excludes market data, business analytics, and public datasets.
cat_sub23_sub23.decision_rule: If the service primarily accesses personal financial accounts, transaction data, or user profile information, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub3.name: Database & Data Access
cat_sub23_sub3.description: Services for interacting with databases, executing queries, managing schemas, and accessing structured data sources.
cat_sub23_sub3.boundary: Focuses on direct data access, query execution, and structured data interaction. Excludes data warehousing, business intelligence tools, and specialized analytics platforms.
cat_sub23_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides database connectivity, query execution, or structured data access, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub4.name: Data Warehousing
cat_sub23_sub4.description: Services for large-scale analytical data storage, querying, and data lake capabilities.
cat_sub23_sub4.boundary: Focuses on analytical storage and large-scale query processing. Excludes transactional databases, business intelligence visualization, and real-time streaming.
cat_sub23_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides analytical data storage, large-scale query processing, or data lake capabilities, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub5.name: Blockchain Analytics
cat_sub23_sub5.description: Services for analyzing blockchain transactions, smart contracts, tokens, and on-chain data.
cat_sub23_sub5.boundary: Focuses on blockchain protocol data analysis. Excludes cryptocurrency market data, financial trading platforms, and general database systems.
cat_sub23_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes blockchain data, smart contracts, or on-chain transactions, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub6.name: Web Data Extraction
cat_sub23_sub6.description: Services for scraping, crawling, and extracting structured data from websites and web applications.
cat_sub23_sub6.boundary: Focuses on structured data extraction from web sources. Excludes browser automation, API data access, and document processing.
cat_sub23_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily extracts structured data from websites or web applications, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub7.name: Observability & Monitoring
cat_sub23_sub7.description: Services for collecting, querying, and analyzing logs, metrics, traces, and system performance data.
cat_sub23_sub7.boundary: Focuses on system and application performance monitoring. Excludes business analytics, financial data, and specialized IoT/industrial monitoring.
cat_sub23_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily monitors system performance, analyzes logs, or tracks application metrics, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub8.name: Geospatial Data
cat_sub23_sub8.description: Services for mapping, location data, geocoding, routing, and geographic information systems.
cat_sub23_sub8.boundary: Focuses on geographic data and location services. Excludes general data visualization, business analytics, and non-geographic data.
cat_sub23_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides mapping, location services, or geographic data analysis, classify here.

cat_sub23_sub9.name: Document Processing
cat_sub23_sub9.description: Services for extracting, converting, analyzing, and managing documents in various formats.
cat_sub23_sub9.boundary: Focuses on document content extraction and format conversion. Excludes web scraping, database management, and general file storage.
cat_sub23_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily processes documents (PDF, Word, Excel, etc.) for data extraction or conversion, classify here.

cat_sub24_sub1.name: Financial Services AI
cat_sub24_sub1.description: AI for trading, market analysis, risk assessment, and financial data processing.
cat_sub24_sub1.boundary: Services that primarily process financial data, execute trades, or analyze financial markets.
cat_sub24_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's core function is financial data analysis, trading, or market prediction.

cat_sub24_sub10.name: Blockchain & Web3 AI
cat_sub24_sub10.description: AI for cryptocurrency analysis, smart contracts, blockchain data, and decentralized apps.
cat_sub24_sub10.boundary: Services interacting with blockchain networks, cryptocurrencies, or smart contracts.
cat_sub24_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily analyzes blockchain data, interacts with cryptocurrencies, or integrates with smart contracts.

cat_sub24_sub11.name: Media & Entertainment AI
cat_sub24_sub11.description: AI for video/audio editing, music production, gaming, and entertainment content.
cat_sub24_sub11.boundary: Services processing or managing entertainment-focused audio, video, or interactive content.
cat_sub24_sub11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily edits, produces, or manages content for entertainment, gaming, or media consumption.

cat_sub24_sub12.name: Data & Analytics AI
cat_sub24_sub12.description: AI for database querying, visualization, business intelligence, e-commerce, and retail analytics.
cat_sub24_sub12.boundary: Services focused on querying, transforming, visualizing, or reporting on structured data.
cat_sub24_sub12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily queries databases, creates data visualizations, or automates analytical reporting workflows.

cat_sub24_sub13.name: Communication AI
cat_sub24_sub13.description: AI for messaging, calls, transcription, translation, and communication platforms.
cat_sub24_sub13.boundary: Services enabling or enhancing human-to-human or human-to-AI communication.
cat_sub24_sub13.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily enables, transcribes, translates, or manages communication between parties.

cat_sub24_sub14.name: Infrastructure & DevOps AI
cat_sub24_sub14.description: AI for cloud management, deployment automation, monitoring, and infrastructure operations.
cat_sub24_sub14.boundary: Services managing compute, storage, networking, deployment pipelines, or system observability.
cat_sub24_sub14.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily manages cloud infrastructure, automates deployments, monitors systems, or supports DevOps workflows.

cat_sub24_sub15.name: AI Agent Frameworks
cat_sub24_sub15.description: AI for building, managing, and connecting AI agents, MCP servers, and agent workflows.
cat_sub24_sub15.boundary: Services providing foundational tools, protocols, or platforms for AI agent systems.
cat_sub24_sub15.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily provides infrastructure or platforms for building, connecting, or managing AI agents or MCP servers.

cat_sub24_sub16.name: AI APIs & Tools
cat_sub24_sub16.description: AI services accessible via APIs, SDKs, or integrations to enhance applications.
cat_sub24_sub16.boundary: Services that provide AI capabilities through programmatic interfaces for integration.
cat_sub24_sub16.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily offers AI functionality through APIs, SDKs, or direct integrations into other applications.

cat_sub24_sub17.name: Personal & Productivity AI
cat_sub24_sub17.description: AI for task management, scheduling, note-taking, travel planning, and personal workflows.
cat_sub24_sub17.boundary: Services assisting individuals with organization, planning, note-taking, or personal task automation.
cat_sub24_sub17.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily manages personal tasks, schedules, notes, travel itineraries, or individual productivity.

cat_sub24_sub18.name: Gaming & Simulation AI
cat_sub24_sub18.description: AI for game development, character behavior, simulation environments, and interactive experiences.
cat_sub24_sub18.boundary: Services creating or powering interactive games, simulations, or virtual environments.
cat_sub24_sub18.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily develops games, simulates environments, creates character behaviors, or integrates with gaming platforms.

cat_sub24_sub19.name: Computer Vision & Multimedia AI
cat_sub24_sub19.description: AI for image/video analysis, object detection, document processing, and visual data interpretation.
cat_sub24_sub19.boundary: Services analyzing or interpreting visual content, including images, videos, and documents.
cat_sub24_sub19.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily analyzes visual content (images, video, documents) for information extraction, object detection, or classification.

cat_sub24_sub2.name: Healthcare & Biomedical AI
cat_sub24_sub2.description: AI for medical research, clinical data analysis, drug discovery, and healthcare operations.
cat_sub24_sub2.boundary: Services focused on medical, clinical, pharmaceutical, or biological data and processes.
cat_sub24_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily handles medical data, clinical research, or healthcare workflows.

cat_sub24_sub20.name: Search & Information Retrieval AI
cat_sub24_sub20.description: AI for web search, information retrieval, knowledge discovery, and dynamic problem-solving.
cat_sub24_sub20.boundary: Services focused on searching, retrieving, and synthesizing information from various sources.
cat_sub24_sub20.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily performs search operations, retrieves information, or assists in knowledge discovery through querying.

cat_sub24_sub3.name: Software Development AI
cat_sub24_sub3.description: AI for code generation, debugging, testing, repository analysis, and development workflows.
cat_sub24_sub3.boundary: Services that assist software engineers in writing, analyzing, or managing code.
cat_sub24_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily assists with coding, debugging, testing, or software project management.

cat_sub24_sub4.name: Content Creation AI
cat_sub24_sub4.description: AI for generating and editing text, images, video, audio, and multimedia content.
cat_sub24_sub4.boundary: Services focused on producing or modifying creative or informational digital content.
cat_sub24_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily creates, edits, or generates digital content for publication or distribution.

cat_sub24_sub5.name: Research & Analysis AI
cat_sub24_sub5.description: AI for academic research, data exploration, scientific analysis, and knowledge discovery.
cat_sub24_sub5.boundary: Services enabling investigative, exploratory, or analytical work across domains.
cat_sub24_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily enables research, data exploration, hypothesis testing, or analytical discovery.

cat_sub24_sub6.name: Business Operations AI
cat_sub24_sub6.description: AI for CRM, ERP, sales, marketing, support, legal, education, and enterprise workflows.
cat_sub24_sub6.boundary: Services automating core business functions, customer interactions, or professional processes.
cat_sub24_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily automates business processes, manages customer data, or supports enterprise/professional operations.

cat_sub24_sub7.name: Design & Creative AI
cat_sub24_sub7.description: AI for graphic design, UI/UX, 3D modeling, CAD, and creative tool integration.
cat_sub24_sub7.boundary: Services assisting with visual design, spatial modeling, or creative tool workflows.
cat_sub24_sub7.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily assists with visual design, modeling, prototyping, or creative tool execution.

cat_sub24_sub8.name: IoT & Industrial AI
cat_sub24_sub8.description: AI for industrial monitoring, predictive maintenance, sensor data, and IoT platforms.
cat_sub24_sub8.boundary: Services processing physical sensor data for monitoring, control, or maintenance.
cat_sub24_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily processes industrial or IoT sensor data for equipment monitoring, control, or predictive maintenance.

cat_sub24_sub9.name: Security & Compliance AI
cat_sub24_sub9.description: AI for cybersecurity, threat detection, compliance monitoring, and vulnerability analysis.
cat_sub24_sub9.boundary: Services focused on protecting systems, detecting malicious activity, or ensuring regulatory adherence.
cat_sub24_sub9.decision_rule: Classify here if the service primarily detects security threats, vulnerabilities, or monitors for compliance violations.

cat_sub25_sub1.name: Identity & Access Management
cat_sub25_sub1.description: Services for authentication, authorization, user management, and identity federation across systems.
cat_sub25_sub1.boundary: Managing user identities, credentials, or access permissions for systems/applications.
cat_sub25_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to manage user identities, credentials, or access permissions for systems and applications.

cat_sub25_sub10.name: Privacy, Data & Security Governance
cat_sub25_sub10.description: Services that manage data privacy, classification, lineage, governance, and security policies.
cat_sub25_sub10.boundary: Data classification, privacy, governance policies, and overarching security policy management.
cat_sub25_sub10.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to manage data privacy, classification, governance, or define/enforce security policies.

cat_sub25_sub11.name: Security Orchestration & Automation
cat_sub25_sub11.description: Services that coordinate security tools, automate workflows, and integrate physical/digital security.
cat_sub25_sub11.boundary: Security workflow automation and integration across multiple tools or domains.
cat_sub25_sub11.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to orchestrate or automate security workflows across multiple tools or domains.

cat_sub25_sub12.name: Threat Intelligence
cat_sub25_sub12.description: Services that provide information about threats, vulnerabilities, and threat actors from external sources.
cat_sub25_sub12.boundary: External threat data, indicators, and intelligence feeds.
cat_sub25_sub12.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to provide external threat data, indicators, or intelligence feeds.

cat_sub25_sub13.name: Secure Development & Architecture
cat_sub25_sub13.description: Services that integrate security into development workflows, code analysis, and architectural design.
cat_sub25_sub13.boundary: Security during development phase, including code analysis, remediation, and architectural security insights.
cat_sub25_sub13.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to help developers write secure code, fix security issues, or analyze architectural security.

cat_sub25_sub16.name: Digital Identity & Verification
cat_sub25_sub16.description: Services that verify digital identities, manage decentralized systems, and prevent identity fraud.
cat_sub25_sub16.boundary: Decentralized identity management, verification services, and identity fraud prevention.
cat_sub25_sub16.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to verify digital identities or manage decentralized identity systems.

cat_sub25_sub18.name: Secure Communication
cat_sub25_sub18.description: Services that secure email, messaging, communication channels, and business communication platforms.
cat_sub25_sub18.boundary: Securing communication channels (email, messaging) and business communication platforms/APIs.
cat_sub25_sub18.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to secure email, messaging, other communication channels, or business communication platforms.

cat_sub25_sub2.name: Vulnerability & Risk Assessment
cat_sub25_sub2.description: Services that scan code, dependencies, or systems to identify security vulnerabilities and risks.
cat_sub25_sub2.boundary: Proactive discovery and reporting of security flaws in code, packages, or infrastructure.
cat_sub25_sub2.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to find and report security flaws in code, packages, or infrastructure.

cat_sub25_sub20.name: Security Validation & Testing
cat_sub25_sub20.description: Services that validate security controls through testing, chaos engineering, and reliability assessments.
cat_sub25_sub20.boundary: Testing and validating the effectiveness of security controls and system reliability.
cat_sub25_sub20.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to test or validate the effectiveness of security controls or system reliability.

cat_sub25_sub22.name: Blockchain & Distributed Ledger Security
cat_sub25_sub22.description: Services that secure blockchain networks, smart contracts, and distributed ledger technologies.
cat_sub25_sub22.boundary: Security for blockchain networks, smart contracts, and distributed ledger systems.
cat_sub25_sub22.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to provide security for blockchain networks, smart contracts, or distributed ledgers.

cat_sub25_sub23.name: Data Platform Security
cat_sub25_sub23.description: Services that secure customer data platforms, metadata management, and data synchronization systems.
cat_sub25_sub23.boundary: Security for data platforms, metadata management, and data synchronization systems.
cat_sub25_sub23.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to secure customer data platforms, metadata management, or data synchronization systems.

cat_sub25_sub3.name: Threat Detection & Response
cat_sub25_sub3.description: Services that monitor for active security threats, analyze incidents, and support remediation.
cat_sub25_sub3.boundary: Active security monitoring, incident analysis, and response.
cat_sub25_sub3.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to detect, analyze, or respond to active security incidents.

cat_sub25_sub4.name: Data Protection & Encryption
cat_sub25_sub4.description: Services that encrypt data, manage cryptographic keys, or apply data masking/redaction.
cat_sub25_sub4.boundary: Protecting data at rest and in transit through cryptographic or obfuscation techniques.
cat_sub25_sub4.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to encrypt data, manage encryption keys, or redact/mask sensitive content.

cat_sub25_sub5.name: Compliance & Audit Management
cat_sub25_sub5.description: Services that monitor, test, and report on compliance with security frameworks and regulations.
cat_sub25_sub5.boundary: Compliance evidence management, controls testing, and audit reporting.
cat_sub25_sub5.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to manage compliance evidence, test controls, or generate audit reports.

cat_sub25_sub6.name: Application Security Testing
cat_sub25_sub6.description: Services that test web applications and APIs for security vulnerabilities.
cat_sub25_sub6.boundary: Testing running applications (web/API) for security flaws.
cat_sub25_sub6.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to test running applications (web/API) for security vulnerabilities.

cat_sub25_sub7.name: Infrastructure Security
cat_sub25_sub7.description: Services that secure servers, networks, cloud infrastructure, endpoints, and network policies.
cat_sub25_sub7.boundary: Securing infrastructure components like servers, networks, firewalls, endpoints, and network access rules.
cat_sub25_sub7.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to secure infrastructure components (servers, networks, endpoints) or define network security policies.

cat_sub25_sub8.name: Secrets & Credential Management
cat_sub25_sub8.description: Services that detect, manage, and protect secrets, API keys, certificates, and sensitive credentials.
cat_sub25_sub8.boundary: Managing machine credentials, secrets, API keys, and certificates.
cat_sub25_sub8.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to find, manage, or protect secrets, API keys, or certificates.

cat_sub25_sub9.name: Supply Chain Security
cat_sub25_sub9.description: Services that secure software supply chains by vetting dependencies, packages, and container images.
cat_sub25_sub9.boundary: Third-party dependency and software artifact security assessment.
cat_sub25_sub9.decision_rule: Classify here if the service's primary function is to assess or secure third-party dependencies and software artifacts.

cat_sub26_sub1.name: Infrastructure Provisioning
cat_sub26_sub1.description: Services that provision and manage fundamental cloud infrastructure components like compute, storage, and networking.
cat_sub26_sub1.boundary: Raw infrastructure resources (VMs, bare metal, block storage, networking, load balancers). Excludes CDNs, edge computing, application platforms, and specialized data services.
cat_sub26_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily provisions or manages raw compute, storage, or networking infrastructure, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub10.name: Development & Backend Platforms
cat_sub26_sub10.description: Integrated platforms providing backend services, tools, and environments for application development.
cat_sub26_sub10.boundary: Backend-as-a-Service (BaaS), low-code platforms, development tools, communication APIs (email/SMS/push), code sandboxes. Excludes raw infrastructure and complete application hosting.
cat_sub26_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides integrated backend services, development tools, or communication APIs for app development, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub11.name: Serverless Computing
cat_sub26_sub11.description: Platforms that execute code in response to events without managing servers, with automatic scaling.
cat_sub26_sub11.boundary: Event-driven function execution (FaaS). Excludes traditional application deployment, containers, and managed runtimes.
cat_sub26_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily executes event-driven code without server management, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub12.name: Container & Artifact Services
cat_sub26_sub12.description: Services for building, deploying, and managing containers, images, and software artifacts.
cat_sub26_sub12.boundary: Container registries, orchestration (Kubernetes), container platforms, package registries, artifact repositories. Excludes VMs, serverless, and general object storage.
cat_sub26_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages containers, containerized applications, or software artifacts/packages, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub13.name: AI & Machine Learning Services
cat_sub26_sub13.description: Cloud services for AI/ML model training, inference, and specialized compute-intensive workloads.
cat_sub26_sub13.boundary: AI/ML platforms, model training/inference, GPU compute, speech/text processing. Excludes general compute and data analytics.
cat_sub26_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides AI/ML capabilities, model training/inference, or specialized compute for these workloads, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub2.name: Application Deployment
cat_sub26_sub2.description: Platforms that deploy, host, and manage applications or websites with integrated runtime environments.
cat_sub26_sub2.boundary: Complete application/website hosting with managed runtime (PaaS, web hosting). Excludes raw infrastructure, serverless functions, and low-code development platforms.
cat_sub26_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily deploys and hosts complete applications/websites with managed runtime and scaling, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub3.name: Database Services
cat_sub26_sub3.description: Managed database platforms providing data storage, querying, and management capabilities.
cat_sub26_sub3.boundary: Managed SQL/NoSQL databases for transactional workloads. Excludes data analytics/warehousing, object storage, and in-memory caches.
cat_sub26_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides managed database functionality for transactional data, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub4.name: Data Analytics & Warehousing
cat_sub26_sub4.description: Services for running analytical queries, data exploration, data warehousing, and business intelligence.
cat_sub26_sub4.boundary: Analytical processing, data warehouses, BI tools, ETL pipelines. Excludes transactional databases and general object storage.
cat_sub26_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables analytical queries, data exploration, data warehousing, or BI, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub5.name: Object & File Storage
cat_sub26_sub5.description: Services for storing and retrieving unstructured data objects, files, and documents.
cat_sub26_sub5.boundary: Unstructured data storage (objects, files, documents, media). Includes file sync/sharing. Excludes databases, block storage, and artifact repositories.
cat_sub26_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily stores and retrieves unstructured data objects or files, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub6.name: Content Delivery & Edge Computing
cat_sub26_sub6.description: Platforms that optimize content delivery through caching, edge networks, and edge compute capabilities.
cat_sub26_sub6.boundary: CDNs, edge computing, image/video optimization, web performance. Excludes raw infrastructure provisioning and general compute services.
cat_sub26_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily optimizes content delivery or provides edge computing capabilities, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub7.name: Infrastructure as Code
cat_sub26_sub7.description: Tools for defining, provisioning, and managing cloud infrastructure through declarative configuration.
cat_sub26_sub7.boundary: Infrastructure definition and management via configuration files/templates. Excludes direct provisioning UIs and cost management tools.
cat_sub26_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables infrastructure management through declarative configuration files, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub8.name: Cloud Cost & Governance
cat_sub26_sub8.description: Services that monitor, analyze, and optimize cloud spending, resources, and compliance.
cat_sub26_sub8.boundary: Cost monitoring, optimization, resource governance, compliance, security posture management. Excludes direct infrastructure provisioning.
cat_sub26_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily analyzes, monitors, or optimizes cloud costs, resources, or governance policies, classify here.

cat_sub26_sub9.name: Identity, Access & Security
cat_sub26_sub9.description: Services for authentication, authorization, identity management, and data security in the cloud.
cat_sub26_sub9.boundary: Authentication, authorization, SSO, encryption key management, security policies. Excludes general infrastructure and compliance monitoring.
cat_sub26_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages user identity, access control, or data security policies, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub1.name: AI & Agent Tools
cat_sub27_sub1.description: Services aggregating APIs for AI models, agents, expert networks, and AI workflow orchestration.
cat_sub27_sub1.boundary: Includes AI model APIs, agent frameworks, and human expert networks. Excludes general SaaS automation and raw data sources.
cat_sub27_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily aggregates APIs for AI models, agents, expert consultation, or AI-specific workflows, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub10.name: Multi-Domain Aggregators
cat_sub27_sub10.description: Services aggregating APIs across multiple functional domains without specialization.
cat_sub27_sub10.boundary: Includes broad API collections spanning multiple categories. Excludes specialized aggregators focused on single domains.
cat_sub27_sub10.decision_rule: If the service aggregates APIs across 3+ functional domains without clear specialization, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub8.name: Developer Tools & SaaS
cat_sub27_sub8.description: Services aggregating APIs for development, code execution, API discovery, and SaaS integrations.
cat_sub27_sub8.boundary: Includes API discovery, code execution, function libraries, and business SaaS automation. Excludes AI model APIs and end-user apps.
cat_sub27_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily aggregates APIs for developer tools, API discovery, or business SaaS automation, classify here.

cat_sub27_sub9.name: API Discovery & Management
cat_sub27_sub9.description: Services aggregating APIs for discovering, testing, and managing APIs across multiple providers.
cat_sub27_sub9.boundary: Includes API directories, testing tools, and management platforms. Excludes domain-specific APIs and data extraction.
cat_sub27_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily aggregates APIs for API discovery, testing, or lifecycle management, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub1.name: Web & General Search
cat_sub28_sub1.description: Services for general web search, crawling, and broad internet information retrieval.
cat_sub28_sub1.boundary: General-purpose search engines and web crawlers. Excludes domain-specific searches.
cat_sub28_sub1.decision_rule: Classify here ONLY if the service searches the general, unstructured web. If it searches a specific domain (products, jobs, etc.), use that category.

cat_sub28_sub10.name: Social Media & Forums
cat_sub28_sub10.description: Services for searching social media platforms, discussion forums, and community content.
cat_sub28_sub10.boundary: Public posts, comments, threads, and user-generated content from social platforms.
cat_sub28_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches social media platforms or discussion forums, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub11.name: Events & Local Services
cat_sub28_sub11.description: Services for searching events, tickets, local businesses, and points of interest.
cat_sub28_sub11.boundary: Event listings, ticket vendors, local business directories, and venue information.
cat_sub28_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for events, local services, or points of interest, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub12.name: Maps & Geospatial
cat_sub28_sub12.description: Services for searching locations, geographic data, points of interest, and routing.
cat_sub28_sub12.boundary: Maps, geocoding, places, addresses, and spatial datasets. Includes IP geolocation.
cat_sub28_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for physical locations, geographic data, or spatial information, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub14.name: Developer & Technical
cat_sub28_sub14.description: Services for searching technical documentation, code repositories, APIs, and developer resources.
cat_sub28_sub14.boundary: Code search, API documentation, technical forums, and developer tooling data.
cat_sub28_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for technical documentation or developer resources, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub15.name: Network & Infrastructure
cat_sub28_sub15.description: Services for searching domain information, IP addresses, SSL certificates, and network data.
cat_sub28_sub15.boundary: Domain registries, IP lookups, network scans, and internet infrastructure records.
cat_sub28_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for domain, IP, or network infrastructure information, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub17.name: Software & Packages
cat_sub28_sub17.description: Services for searching software packages, libraries, containers, and application components.
cat_sub28_sub17.boundary: Package managers, container registries, library repositories, and software catalogs.
cat_sub28_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for software packages, libraries, or containers, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub2.name: E-commerce & Products
cat_sub28_sub2.description: Services for searching products, shopping data, prices, and e-commerce platforms.
cat_sub28_sub2.boundary: Product catalogs, price comparison, and shopping platforms. Includes software marketplaces.
cat_sub28_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for commercial products or shopping data, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub21.name: Enterprise & Knowledge Graph
cat_sub28_sub21.description: Services for searching unified enterprise knowledge, semantic graphs, and internal data sources.
cat_sub28_sub21.boundary: Enterprise search platforms, knowledge graph querying, and unified data source connectors.
cat_sub28_sub21.decision_rule: If the service searches across unified enterprise knowledge bases or semantic graphs, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub22.name: Local & File Search
cat_sub28_sub22.description: Services for searching local files, documents, drives, and personal data repositories.
cat_sub28_sub22.boundary: Desktop search, document indexing, cloud drive search, and local database querying.
cat_sub28_sub22.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches local files, documents, or personal data stores, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub23.name: Tool & API Discovery
cat_sub28_sub23.description: Services for dynamically discovering, searching, and calling tools, functions, or APIs.
cat_sub28_sub23.boundary: Tool registries, API directories, and dynamic function discovery for agentic workflows.
cat_sub28_sub23.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for or discovers executable tools, functions, or APIs, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub5.name: Business & Company Data
cat_sub28_sub5.description: Services for searching business entities, company registries, and corporate information.
cat_sub28_sub5.boundary: Business directories, corporate filings, and company databases. Includes startup data.
cat_sub28_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for business entities or corporate registry data, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub6.name: Finance & Markets
cat_sub28_sub6.description: Services for searching financial data, cryptocurrency prices, stocks, and market information.
cat_sub28_sub6.boundary: Financial instruments, crypto assets, market indices, and economic data.
cat_sub28_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for financial market data or cryptocurrency information, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub7.name: Academic & Research
cat_sub28_sub7.description: Services for searching academic papers, research data, scientific publications, and patents.
cat_sub28_sub7.boundary: Scholarly databases, research repositories, preprint servers, and patent libraries.
cat_sub28_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for academic papers, research publications, or patents, classify here.

cat_sub28_sub8.name: News & Media Content
cat_sub28_sub8.description: Services for searching news articles, media, entertainment, movies, music, and artwork.
cat_sub28_sub8.boundary: News aggregators, media databases, entertainment catalogs, and digital art collections.
cat_sub28_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for news, media, or entertainment content (articles, movies, music, art), classify here.

cat_sub28_sub9.name: Reference & Knowledge Bases
cat_sub28_sub9.description: Services for searching dictionaries, encyclopedias, books, library catalogs, and reference works.
cat_sub28_sub9.boundary: Reference materials, digital libraries, book databases, and factual knowledge bases.
cat_sub28_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily searches for reference works, books, or factual knowledge entries, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub1.name: Retail E-commerce Platforms
cat_sub4_sub1.description: Services for managing online storefronts, products, orders, and customer data for direct-to-consumer sales.
cat_sub4_sub1.boundary: Includes platforms for building and operating digital storefronts, shopping carts, and product catalogs. Also includes services that aggregate consumer discounts, coupons, and promotions from merchants.
cat_sub4_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables setting up/managing a digital store to sell goods/services to end consumers OR aggregates consumer discounts/promotions, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub10.name: Accounting, Invoicing & Personal Finance
cat_sub4_sub10.description: Services for business financial management (bookkeeping, invoicing) and personal financial management (budgeting, expense tracking).
cat_sub4_sub10.boundary: Includes software for business accounting, invoicing, expense management, and financial reporting. Also includes tools for individuals to manage personal budgets, track spending, and plan finances.
cat_sub4_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily handles financial record-keeping, invoicing, business accounting, OR helps individuals manage personal budgets and spending, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub12.name: Enterprise Resource Planning & Business Operations
cat_sub4_sub12.description: Services for integrated business management systems handling finance, supply chain, operations, HR, and analytics.
cat_sub4_sub12.boundary: Includes comprehensive software suites that integrate multiple core business functions (finance, HR, manufacturing, supply chain). May include adjacent business process management and marketing automation tools.
cat_sub4_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides integrated software for managing multiple core business operations and processes, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub14.name: Regulatory, Compliance & Digital Agreements
cat_sub4_sub14.description: Services for regulatory filings, compliance data, sanctions screening, and electronic signatures/contracts.
cat_sub4_sub14.boundary: Includes access to official regulatory documents, compliance monitoring tools, government registries, and platforms for creating/managing legally binding electronic signatures and contracts.
cat_sub4_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides regulatory/compliance data/tools OR enables electronic signing/contract management, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub17.name: Trading Automation & Prediction Markets
cat_sub4_sub17.description: Services for algorithmic trading, automated strategies, backtesting, and trading on event outcomes.
cat_sub4_sub17.boundary: Includes platforms for automated trade execution, strategy backtesting, algorithmic trading bots, and markets for trading on the outcome of future events.
cat_sub4_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables automated/algorithmic trading, strategy backtesting, OR trading on future event outcomes, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub18.name: Business Intelligence & Analytics
cat_sub4_sub18.description: Services for analyzing business performance, sales data, customer insights, and operational metrics.
cat_sub4_sub18.boundary: Includes analytics, reporting, and dashboard tools for business operations, sales, customer behavior, and performance metrics. Focus on data visualization and insights.
cat_sub4_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides analytics, reporting, or insights on business operations and performance metrics, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub2.name: Payment Processors
cat_sub4_sub2.description: Services that handle the technical transaction of funds between parties, supporting various payment methods.
cat_sub4_sub2.boundary: Includes gateways and processors that facilitate the movement of money between buyer and seller during a transaction. Supports cards, bank transfers, digital wallets, etc.
cat_sub4_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates the movement of money between buyer and seller during a purchase, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub22.name: Financial API Integration & Developer Tools
cat_sub4_sub22.description: Services providing APIs, SDKs, and tools for developers to integrate financial and commerce functionality into applications.
cat_sub4_sub22.boundary: Includes API platforms, SDKs, and developer tools specifically for integrating payments, banking, trading, or other financial/commerce capabilities. Focus is on the integration layer for developers.
cat_sub4_sub22.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides APIs, SDKs, or tools for developers to integrate financial or commerce functionality into their own applications, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub3.name: Banking & Accounts
cat_sub4_sub3.description: Services for accessing and managing traditional bank accounts, balances, transactions, and financial products.
cat_sub4_sub3.boundary: Includes access to deposit/checking/savings accounts, loans, and other products from regulated financial institutions. Focus on account management and traditional banking services.
cat_sub4_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides access to deposit/checking/savings accounts at regulated financial institutions, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub4.name: Cryptocurrency Exchanges
cat_sub4_sub4.description: Services for trading digital assets on centralized platforms, providing market data and order execution.
cat_sub4_sub4.boundary: Includes centralized marketplaces for buying, selling, and trading cryptocurrencies and other digital assets. Provides order books, trading interfaces, and custody services.
cat_sub4_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily operates as a centralized marketplace for buying/selling cryptocurrencies, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub5.name: Blockchain Infrastructure
cat_sub4_sub5.description: Services providing foundational access to blockchain networks for querying data, executing transactions, and managing wallets.
cat_sub4_sub5.boundary: Includes node providers, wallet SDKs, blockchain APIs, and general-purpose tools for interacting with blockchain networks (transactions, queries, smart contract deployment).
cat_sub4_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily offers general-purpose interaction with blockchain networks (transactions, queries, wallets), classify here.

cat_sub4_sub6.name: Decentralized Finance
cat_sub4_sub6.description: Services for non-custodial financial applications on blockchain, including swaps, lending, staking, and yield farming.
cat_sub4_sub6.boundary: Includes decentralized exchanges (DEXs), lending/borrowing protocols, liquidity pools, yield aggregators, and other peer-to-peer financial applications using smart contracts.
cat_sub4_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables peer-to-peer financial activities through smart contracts without intermediaries, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub7.name: Traditional Trading & Brokerage
cat_sub4_sub7.description: Services for buying/selling stocks, options, ETFs, and other regulated securities through brokerage platforms.
cat_sub4_sub7.boundary: Includes brokerage platforms, trading apps, and services that execute trades of traditional securities (stocks, bonds, options, ETFs, mutual funds) through licensed entities.
cat_sub4_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily executes trades of traditional securities (stocks, options, ETFs) through licensed brokers, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub8.name: Market Data & Research
cat_sub4_sub8.description: Services providing financial market information, company fundamentals, economic data, and analytical tools.
cat_sub4_sub8.boundary: Includes real-time market data feeds, financial news, company financials, economic indicators, analyst reports, and investment research platforms for traditional and crypto markets.
cat_sub4_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily supplies financial information, research, or analytical tools for investment decisions, classify here.

cat_sub4_sub9.name: Cryptocurrency Analytics
cat_sub4_sub9.description: Services offering specialized data, metrics, and insights for digital assets, including prices, sentiment, and on-chain analysis.
cat_sub4_sub9.boundary: Includes cryptocurrency price tracking, portfolio trackers, on-chain analytics, token metrics, decentralized application (dApp) analytics, and crypto-specific market intelligence.
cat_sub4_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides cryptocurrency-specific data, metrics, or analytical insights, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub1.name: Customer Relationship Management
cat_sub6_sub1.description: Services for managing customer data, interactions, relationships, sales pipelines, and proposals.
cat_sub6_sub1.boundary: Focuses on customer lifecycle management including sales processes. Excludes marketing campaign execution and customer support ticketing.
cat_sub6_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages customer data, interactions, relationships, sales pipelines, or proposals, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub10.name: Customer Support
cat_sub6_sub10.description: Services for managing customer support tickets, help desks, and service request tracking.
cat_sub6_sub10.boundary: Focuses on post-sale customer service operations. Excludes general CRM and marketing automation systems.
cat_sub6_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages customer support cases or help desk operations, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub12.name: Business Intelligence
cat_sub6_sub12.description: Services for data analytics, reporting, dashboard creation, and business performance monitoring.
cat_sub6_sub12.boundary: Focuses on business analytics and data visualization. Excludes marketing analytics and financial accounting systems.
cat_sub6_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides business analytics, reporting, or data visualization, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub13.name: Workflow Automation
cat_sub6_sub13.description: Services for automating internal business processes, task sequences, and approval workflows.
cat_sub6_sub13.boundary: Focuses on automating internal business processes and task sequences. Excludes cross-application integration and project management.
cat_sub6_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates internal business processes and task sequences, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub14.name: Document Management
cat_sub6_sub14.description: Services for creating, storing, organizing, and collaborating on business documents and files.
cat_sub6_sub14.boundary: Focuses on document lifecycle management. Excludes contract management and proposal creation systems.
cat_sub6_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages business documents, files, or knowledge bases, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub15.name: Scheduling & Calendaring
cat_sub6_sub15.description: Services for appointment scheduling, calendar management, meeting coordination, and resource booking.
cat_sub6_sub15.boundary: Focuses on time and resource scheduling. Excludes project timeline management and task scheduling.
cat_sub6_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages appointments, calendars, or meeting scheduling, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub16.name: Product Development
cat_sub6_sub16.description: Services for product management, feature tracking, bug reporting, and development lifecycle management.
cat_sub6_sub16.boundary: Focuses on product development processes. Excludes general project management and business intelligence.
cat_sub6_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages product features, development tasks, or bug tracking, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub18.name: Integration Platforms
cat_sub6_sub18.description: Services for connecting applications, data synchronization, and cross-platform workflow automation.
cat_sub6_sub18.boundary: Focuses on application connectivity and data flow between systems. Excludes internal workflow automation and project management.
cat_sub6_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily connects applications or synchronizes data between platforms, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub19.name: Market Research
cat_sub6_sub19.description: Services for competitive analysis, market intelligence, industry research, and business benchmarking.
cat_sub6_sub19.boundary: Focuses on external market analysis and competitive intelligence. Excludes business intelligence and advertising analytics.
cat_sub6_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides market analysis, competitive intelligence, or industry research, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub2.name: Marketing Automation
cat_sub6_sub2.description: Services for automating marketing campaigns, email marketing, social media management, and audience engagement.
cat_sub6_sub2.boundary: Focuses on automating outbound marketing communications. Excludes customer data management and paid advertising execution.
cat_sub6_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates marketing communications or campaign management, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub20.name: Design & Creative Tools
cat_sub6_sub20.description: Services for design creation, visual content production, creative asset management, and localization.
cat_sub6_sub20.boundary: Focuses on visual design, creative content production, and localization. Excludes document management and marketing automation.
cat_sub6_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables design creation, visual content production, prototyping, or localization, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub21.name: Form & Data Collection
cat_sub6_sub21.description: Services for creating forms, surveys, questionnaires, and structured data collection from users.
cat_sub6_sub21.boundary: Focuses on structured data input and form-based information gathering. Excludes document management and customer support systems.
cat_sub6_sub21.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates forms, surveys, or structured data collection tools, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub23.name: Optimization & Decision Support
cat_sub6_sub23.description: Services for constraint solving, optimization algorithms, recommendation engines, and decision automation.
cat_sub6_sub23.boundary: Focuses on algorithmic problem-solving and decision optimization. Excludes general business intelligence and workflow automation.
cat_sub6_sub23.decision_rule: If the service primarily provides optimization algorithms, constraint solving, or recommendation engines, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub3.name: Advertising Platforms
cat_sub6_sub3.description: Services for creating, managing, and analyzing paid advertising campaigns across digital platforms.
cat_sub6_sub3.boundary: Focuses on paid media buying and campaign execution. Excludes organic marketing automation and customer relationship management.
cat_sub6_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages paid advertising campaigns and analytics, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub4.name: E-commerce Platforms
cat_sub6_sub4.description: Services for online store management, product catalog management, order processing, and payment handling.
cat_sub6_sub4.boundary: Focuses on transactional online store operations. Excludes customer relationship management and general marketing automation.
cat_sub6_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages online stores, products, or orders, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub5.name: Project Management
cat_sub6_sub5.description: Services for planning, tracking, and managing projects, tasks, timelines, and team collaboration.
cat_sub6_sub5.boundary: Focuses on project lifecycle management and team coordination. Excludes product development lifecycle tools and workflow automation.
cat_sub6_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages projects, tasks, and team workflows, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub6.name: Human Resources Management
cat_sub6_sub6.description: Services for employee data management, recruitment, time tracking, and HR administration.
cat_sub6_sub6.boundary: Focuses on employee lifecycle and HR processes. Excludes project management and general team collaboration tools.
cat_sub6_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages employee data, recruitment, or HR processes, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub7.name: Accounting & Finance
cat_sub6_sub7.description: Services for financial management, invoicing, billing, expense tracking, and accounting operations.
cat_sub6_sub7.boundary: Focuses on financial transactions and accounting. Excludes e-commerce payment processing and general business intelligence.
cat_sub6_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages financial transactions, invoicing, or accounting, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub8.name: Enterprise Resource Planning
cat_sub6_sub8.description: Services for integrated business management across finance, supply chain, operations, inventory, and reporting.
cat_sub6_sub8.boundary: Focuses on integrated multi-function business systems including asset/inventory. Excludes standalone accounting, CRM, or project management.
cat_sub6_sub8.decision_rule: If the service provides integrated management across multiple business functions including inventory, classify here.

cat_sub6_sub9.name: Communication Platforms
cat_sub6_sub9.description: Services for business messaging, email, SMS, voice communications, and team collaboration tools.
cat_sub6_sub9.boundary: Focuses on business communication channels. Excludes marketing automation and customer support ticketing systems.
cat_sub6_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables business communication channels, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub1.name: Task & Project Management
cat_sub7_sub1.description: Services for creating, tracking, and managing tasks, projects, and work items.
cat_sub7_sub1.boundary: Focuses on discrete work items and project coordination. Excludes time tracking, calendar scheduling, and general team coordination platforms.
cat_sub7_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages discrete work items, tasks, projects, or issues (e.g., creating tickets, updating statuses), classify here.

cat_sub7_sub10.name: Customer Support & Ticketing
cat_sub7_sub10.description: Services for managing customer support interactions, help desks, and ticket systems.
cat_sub7_sub10.boundary: Focuses on customer-facing support workflows. Excludes internal team chat, project management, and general CRM.
cat_sub7_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages customer support tickets, cases, or help desk interactions, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub11.name: Time Tracking & Workforce Management
cat_sub7_sub11.description: Services for tracking time, managing schedules, and analyzing work patterns.
cat_sub7_sub11.boundary: Focuses on time measurement and workforce coordination. Excludes task/project management, calendar scheduling, and communication tools.
cat_sub7_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily tracks time spent on work, manages schedules, or generates timesheets, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub12.name: Diagramming & Visual Collaboration
cat_sub7_sub12.description: Services for creating diagrams, flowcharts, wireframes, and visual workspaces.
cat_sub7_sub12.boundary: Focuses on visual diagram creation and collaboration. Excludes document/presentation creation, project management, and CAD/technical drawing.
cat_sub7_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates diagrams, flowcharts, wireframes, or visual collaboration boards, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub13.name: Notifications & Alerts
cat_sub7_sub13.description: Services for sending push notifications, alerts, and multi-channel notifications.
cat_sub7_sub13.boundary: Focuses on notification delivery infrastructure. Excludes email/messaging, team chat, and marketing campaigns.
cat_sub7_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily sends push notifications, alerts, or pings to users/devices across multiple channels, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub14.name: Document Conversion & Processing
cat_sub7_sub14.description: Services for converting between document formats and processing PDFs.
cat_sub7_sub14.boundary: Focuses on document format transformation. Excludes document/content creation, file storage, and knowledge management.
cat_sub7_sub14.decision_rule: If the service primarily converts documents between formats or processes PDF files, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub15.name: Workflow & Process Automation
cat_sub7_sub15.description: Services for automating business processes and creating workflows across apps.
cat_sub7_sub15.boundary: Focuses on multi-step process automation across applications. Excludes task/project management, team coordination, and single-app scripting.
cat_sub7_sub15.decision_rule: If the service primarily automates multi-step processes or creates workflows that connect different applications, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub16.name: Voice & Telephony
cat_sub7_sub16.description: Services for making voice calls, managing phone numbers, and telephony applications.
cat_sub7_sub16.boundary: Focuses on voice communication infrastructure. Excludes video conferencing, team chat, and email/SMS.
cat_sub7_sub16.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables voice calls, manages phone numbers, or provides telephony infrastructure, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub17.name: E-Signature & Document Workflow
cat_sub7_sub17.description: Services for electronic signatures, contract management, and document approval.
cat_sub7_sub17.boundary: Focuses on document signing and approval processes. Excludes general document creation, PDF processing, and legal document automation.
cat_sub7_sub17.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables electronic signature collection or manages document signing/approval workflows, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub18.name: Team Feedback & Surveys
cat_sub7_sub18.description: Services for conducting team retrospectives, gathering feedback, and running surveys.
cat_sub7_sub18.boundary: Focuses on team feedback collection and analysis. Excludes project management, customer feedback, and performance management.
cat_sub7_sub18.decision_rule: If the service primarily facilitates team retrospectives, feedback collection, or internal surveys, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub19.name: Code & Development Collaboration
cat_sub7_sub19.description: Services for collaborating on code, managing development projects, and tracking engineering work.
cat_sub7_sub19.boundary: Focuses on software development collaboration. Excludes general project management, task tracking, and document collaboration.
cat_sub7_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages software development work, code collaboration, or development project tracking, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub2.name: Document & Content Creation
cat_sub7_sub2.description: Services for creating, editing, and managing documents, presentations, spreadsheets, and notes.
cat_sub7_sub2.boundary: Focuses on content creation and editing. Excludes file storage, document conversion, and knowledge base/wiki platforms.
cat_sub7_sub2.decision_rule: If the service primarily creates or edits the content of documents, slides, spreadsheets, or notes, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub20.name: AI-Powered Productivity
cat_sub7_sub20.description: Services that use AI to enhance productivity tasks like writing, translation, and content generation.
cat_sub7_sub20.boundary: Focuses on AI-enhanced productivity tools. Excludes general AI platforms, human-in-the-loop systems, and domain-specific AI applications.
cat_sub7_sub20.decision_rule: If the service primarily uses AI to assist with productivity tasks like translation, writing, or content generation, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub21.name: Real-time Collaboration
cat_sub7_sub21.description: Services enabling simultaneous multi-user editing, presence awareness, and live collaboration.
cat_sub7_sub21.boundary: Focuses on real-time multi-user collaboration features. Excludes file storage, document creation, and project management without live collaboration.
cat_sub7_sub21.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables real-time simultaneous editing, presence awareness, or live collaboration features, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub3.name: Calendar & Scheduling
cat_sub7_sub3.description: Services for managing calendars, scheduling meetings, appointments, and bookings.
cat_sub7_sub3.boundary: Focuses on time-based coordination and event scheduling. Excludes task management, time tracking, and project planning.
cat_sub7_sub3.decision_rule: If the service primarily manages events, appointments, bookings, or calendar availability, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub4.name: Email & Messaging
cat_sub7_sub4.description: Services for sending, receiving, and managing email or SMS messages.
cat_sub7_sub4.boundary: Focuses on email/SMS communication infrastructure. Excludes team chat, voice/video calls, and customer support systems.
cat_sub7_sub4.decision_rule: If the service primarily sends, receives, or manages email or SMS messages, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub5.name: Team Chat & Instant Messaging
cat_sub7_sub5.description: Services for real-time team communication via channels, direct messages, and group chats.
cat_sub7_sub5.boundary: Focuses on real-time text-based team communication. Excludes email/SMS, voice/video conferencing, and project management.
cat_sub7_sub5.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables real-time text-based team communication in channels or direct messages, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub6.name: Knowledge Base & Wiki
cat_sub7_sub6.description: Services for creating, organizing, and searching internal knowledge bases and documentation.
cat_sub7_sub6.boundary: Focuses on structured, searchable company knowledge. Excludes personal note-taking, document creation, and file storage.
cat_sub7_sub6.decision_rule: If the service primarily organizes and provides searchable access to company/internal knowledge or documentation, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub7.name: Note-Taking & Personal Knowledge
cat_sub7_sub7.description: Services for personal or collaborative note-taking, idea capture, and knowledge management.
cat_sub7_sub7.boundary: Focuses on personal knowledge capture and organization. Excludes formal document creation, knowledge bases, and task management.
cat_sub7_sub7.decision_rule: If the service primarily captures, organizes, and connects personal notes, ideas, or knowledge snippets, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub8.name: File Storage & Collaboration
cat_sub7_sub8.description: Services for storing, sharing, and collaborating on files and folders.
cat_sub7_sub8.boundary: Focuses on file storage and access management. Excludes document creation, knowledge bases, and project management.
cat_sub7_sub8.decision_rule: If the service primarily stores, shares, and manages access to files and folders in a cloud drive, classify here.

cat_sub7_sub9.name: Meeting & Video Conferencing
cat_sub7_sub9.description: Services for hosting, joining, and managing online meetings, video calls, and webinars.
cat_sub7_sub9.boundary: Focuses on real-time audio/video meetings. Excludes team chat, calendar scheduling, and telephony/voice calls.
cat_sub7_sub9.decision_rule: If the service primarily enables video/audio meetings, webinars, or provides meeting recordings/transcripts, classify here.

cat_sub20_sub10_sub1.name: Customer Relationship Management
cat_sub20_sub10_sub1.description: Services for integrating with CRM platforms to manage contacts, companies, sales pipelines, and customer interactions.
cat_sub20_sub10_sub1.boundary: Not for general project management (see Project & Task Management) or communication platforms (see Communication & Messaging).
cat_sub20_sub10_sub1.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with platforms for managing customer data, sales processes, or client relationships, classify here.

cat_sub20_sub10_sub10.name: Design & Creative Tools
cat_sub20_sub10_sub10.description: Services for integrating with platforms for graphic design, prototyping, media management, and content creation workflows.
cat_sub20_sub10_sub10.boundary: Not for project management (see Project & Task Management) or documentation/content management (see Documentation & Knowledge Bases).
cat_sub20_sub10_sub10.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with platforms used by designers for creating visual assets, mockups, or managing media, classify here.

cat_sub20_sub10_sub11.name: Documentation & Knowledge Bases
cat_sub20_sub10_sub11.description: Services for integrating with platforms for managing wikis, documentation, internal knowledge, and collaborative content.
cat_sub20_sub10_sub11.boundary: Not for design tools (see Design & Creative Tools) or project management (see Project & Task Management).
cat_sub20_sub10_sub11.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with platforms for creating, storing, or searching organizational documentation and knowledge, classify here.

cat_sub20_sub10_sub12.name: Travel & Hospitality
cat_sub20_sub10_sub12.description: Services for integrating with platforms for travel planning, booking, location services, and hospitality management.
cat_sub20_sub10_sub12.boundary: Not for general mapping/geolocation APIs used outside of travel contexts (see Utilities & Specialized Data).
cat_sub20_sub10_sub12.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with platforms for searching flights, hotels, attractions, or building travel itineraries, classify here.

cat_sub20_sub10_sub13.name: Blockchain & Web3
cat_sub20_sub10_sub13.description: Services for integrating with platforms for interacting with blockchain networks, smart contracts, DeFi protocols, and cryptocurrencies.
cat_sub20_sub10_sub13.boundary: Not for traditional finance/payment platforms (see Finance & Payments). Focus is on blockchain infrastructure.
cat_sub20_sub10_sub13.decision_rule: If the service primarily integrates with platforms for reading/writing to blockchains, managing crypto wallets, or executing DeFi strategies, classify here.

cat_sub20_sub10_sub17.name: Product Development & Feedback
cat_sub20_sub10_sub17.description: Services for integrating with platforms for product roadmapping, feature prioritization, user feedback collection, and idea management.

cat_sub20_sub10_sub19.decision_rule: If the service primarily acts as a gateway, router, or aggregator to connect to hundreds or thousands of other services across diverse categories, classify here.

cat_sub20_sub10_sub2.name: Project & Task Management
